candidate_items.formula: r_corr = beta * I[abs(residual) >= p75 and near_magic(Z,N)]

generated_variants.formula: r_corr = beta * I[abs(residual) >= p75 and near_magic(Z,N)]

generated_variants.formula: r_corr = beta * I[abs(residual) >= p75 and local_density <= p25]
generated_variants.name: Sparse local-neighborhood high-error cluster offset

generated_variants.formula: r_corr = beta * I[abs(residual) >= p75 and AME2020 comparison was extrapolated]
generated_variants.name: Extrapolated-source high-error cluster offset
generated_variants.rejection_reason: Rejected before execution because the 1-3 candidate budget is already used by magic, N/Z, and local-density cluster proxies; source-status behavior remains reported as cluster context.

generated_variants.formula: r_corr = beta * I[abs(residual) >= p75 and A < 50]
generated_variants.name: Light-A high-error cluster offset
generated_variants.rejection_reason: Rejected before execution because light-A behavior is required as a diagnostic subset, and using it as a fitted patch would risk turning the lane into a small-region correction.

generated_variants.formula: r_corr = beta_l*I[A<50] + beta_m*I[50<=A<150] + beta_h*I[A>=150], gated by high-error membership
generated_variants.name: Three-band A high-error cluster offsets
generated_variants.rejection_reason: Rejected before execution because three fitted A-band offsets would inflate degrees of freedom on the 11-row training residual slice.

generated_variants.formula: r_corr = beta * I[row in deterministic random set with same count as p75 high-error rows]
generated_variants.name: Matched random high-error count control

generated_variants.formula: r_corr = beta * cyclically shifted high-error cluster label
generated_variants.name: Cluster-label shuffle control

limitations: High-error membership and cluster labels come from committed retrospective residuals, so this is a diagnostic lane rather than a blind prediction.
Candidate thresholds are deterministic and selected before candidate fitting, but the surface is still full-known repository data.
The fit surface remains the 11-row NMD-0002 training slice, so coefficient stability is not established.
Matched random, smooth-A, and cluster-label-shuffle controls are reported because high-error targeting can overfit broad residual structure.
No source fetch, canonical result rewrite, PRED entry, claim update, or public-facing physics claim is authorized.

promotion_boundary.required_next_step: Maintainer review before any high-error-cluster follow-up, reveal scoring, RESULT-* artifact, claim, or knowledge update.
